reviews.comment:
Lo visité con ocasión de mis vacaciones unas 3 o 4 veces y en todas tuve excelente atención.
En general teníamos unos dos autos de espera para cargar.
Algo que me gustó es que se puede pagar con QR tanto con Mercado Pago como con la app de YPF que cargan los puntos Serviclub sin necesidad de llevar la tarjeta encima y eso ahorra un montón de tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
I visited it three or four times during my vacation and received excellent service each time.
We usually had about two cars waiting to fill up.
Something I liked was that you can pay with a QR code, both with Mercado Pago and with the YPF app, which loads Serviclub points without having to carry your card, saving a ton of time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNl9hOGt3RRAB
